## Summary

Describe the change in a few clear sentences.

## What Changed

- Explain the main code or documentation updates.
- Mention any user-facing behavior changes.

## Validation

- Describe how this was checked locally.
- Note any tests, manual checks, or scenarios you ran.

## Deployment Notes

- List any config, migration, or environment changes required.
- Write `None` if nothing special is needed.

## Screenshots

Add screenshots or screen recordings for UI changes when relevant.

## Checklist

- [ ] I reviewed the change for accidental secrets, local paths, and debug artifacts.
- [ ] I updated documentation if setup, behavior, or configuration changed.
- [ ] I added or updated validation steps where practical.
- [ ] I called out risks, limitations, or follow-up work if needed.
